parameterdescription.para: The new content surface, or an empty pointer to clear it.

briefdescription.para: Get the content alignment for undersized content.
Replace the content alignment for undersized content.
Layout direct children within this surface.

parameterdescription.para: Layout access for measuring and placing child surfaces.

briefdescription.para: Check if this manager manages the given surface.

simplesect.para: true to accept a surface being added as a child, false to throw an exception.

briefdescription.para: Calculate the content size for one viewport size.
Measure the content size for one viewport size.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position scrollOffset, Rectangle targetRect, WritableBuffer &buffer, const PaintContext &context) noexcept override
memberdef.name: onPaintArea

briefdescription.para: React to a scroll offset change.
A scroll area layout that displays one content surface with optional scroll bars.
